suite.name: Createreview

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Set Window Size
kw.doc: Sets current windows size to given ``width`` and ``height``.

kw.name: Set Window Position
kw.doc: Sets window position using ``x`` and ``y`` coordinates.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Set Window Size
kw.doc: Sets current windows size to given ``width`` and ``height``.

kw.name: Set Window Position
kw.doc: Sets window position using ``x`` and ``y`` coordinates.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Create Session
kw.msg: No keyword with name 'Create Session' found.
kw.status: No keyword with name 'Create Session' found.

kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

test.name: TC01 สร้าง Account Passenger และ Driver ผ่าน Web UI และเข้าหน้า Home

kw.name: Switch Browser
kw.doc: Switches between active browsers using ``index_or_alias``.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.msg: ${ROUTE_CARD} = xpath=//div[contains(@class, 'route-card') and contains(., 'Khon Kaen University') and contains(., 'Tops CentralPlaza')]

kw.msg: Retrying (Retry(total=2, connect=None, read=None, redirect=None, status=None)) after connection broken by 'ConnectionResetError(10054, 'An existing connection was forcibly closed by the remote host', None, 10054, None)': /session/4ffa2203380231f8873ffe59c9d4f972/screenshot

Retrying (Retry(total=1, connect=None, read=None, redirect=None, status=None)) after connection broken by 'NewConnectionError("HTTPConnection(host='localhost', port=49328): Failed to establish a new connection: [WinError 10061] No connection could be made because the target machine actively refused it")': /session/4ffa2203380231f8873ffe59c9d4f972/screenshot

Retrying (Retry(total=0, connect=None, read=None, redirect=None, status=None)) after connection broken by 'NewConnectionError("HTTPConnection(host='localhost', port=49328): Failed to establish a new connection: [WinError 10061] No connection could be made because the target machine actively refused it")': /session/4ffa2203380231f8873ffe59c9d4f972/screenshot

kw.name: Click Button
kw.arg: xpath=//button[contains(., 'ยืนยันการจอง')]
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: ส่งคำขอจองสำเร็จ!
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Switch Browser
kw.doc: Switches between active browsers using ``index_or_alias``.

kw.name: Switch Browser
kw.doc: Switches between active browsers using ``index_or_alias``.

kw.name: Switch Browser
kw.doc: Switches between active browsers using ``index_or_alias``.

test.doc: ทดสอบ 2 หน้าต่างพร้อมกัน ตั้งแต่จองที่นั่งจนจบการเดินทาง

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.msg: Retrying (Retry(total=2, connect=None, read=None, redirect=None, status=None)) after connection broken by 'NewConnectionError("HTTPConnection(host='localhost', port=49328): Failed to establish a new connection: [WinError 10061] No connection could be made because the target machine actively refused it")': /session/4ffa2203380231f8873ffe59c9d4f972

Retrying (Retry(total=1, connect=None, read=None, redirect=None, status=None)) after connection broken by 'NewConnectionError("HTTPConnection(host='localhost', port=49965): Failed to establish a new connection: [WinError 10061] No connection could be made because the target machine actively refused it")': /session/b67ab6c989d6f1380c9b77e4d4e91d27

Retrying (Retry(total=0, connect=None, read=None, redirect=None, status=None)) after connection broken by 'NewConnectionError("HTTPConnection(host='localhost', port=49965): Failed to establish a new connection: [WinError 10061] No connection could be made because the target machine actively refused it")': /session/b67ab6c989d6f1380c9b77e4d4e91d27
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

suite.doc: US1-การ anonymous ฝั่งผู้ใช้ที่เป็น Passenger
